summary: Energetic early‑1970 performance with Jerry’s thundering yet delicate guitar captured on a lively audience recording.
review: The reviewer praises the raw power of this 1970 show, noting that it follows the Fillmore run and captures the band cutting loose. The audience‑sourced tape is described as “amazing to hear,” especially for Jerry Garcia’s dynamic playing, making it an enjoyable listen despite not being a pristine soundboard.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review highlights strong musical performance and acceptable audience recording quality, leading to an overall good rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape with lively ambience; clarity sufficient to hear Jerry’s guitar nuances despite typical crowd noise.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic, free‑flowing performance characteristic of the post‑Fillmore era in early 1970.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as thundering and softly playing, showcasing dynamic guitar work.
